title: 63117258278 Halogen Headlamp TMS Driver Module Replacement for BMW 5 Series F10 F11 F07 Replaces 63117304906 63117267045
features: Fitment: Replacement for BMW 5 Series F07 08-13 (Pre-LCI), 5-Series Saloon F10 (2010-Early 2013) -Pre LCI, 5-Series Estate/Touring F11 (2010-Early 2013)-Pre LCI, 5-Series F07 GT Gran Turismo (2011-2017)-Pre LCI.
Material: The TMS control module is made of plastic material which is wear-resistant, lightweight, ageing-resistant and robust
Function: The module can convert voltage, stabilise current and pulse to ensure that the headlamps work in a safe environment
Customer Service: If you encounter problems during product installation and use. Please contact our technical team in time. Our team will reply to you as soon as possible
description: Product Description Halogen Headlamp TMS Driver Module Reliable TMS Headlamp Module for Vehicles Enhance your vehicle with our TMS Headlamp Driver Module. Made from enduring, lightweight plastic, it stabilizes voltage and current for good headlamp performance and safety. Ensure reliable illumination on every drive Halogen Headlamp TMS Driver Module Fitment Information Replaces Part Numbers: 63117258278, 7258278, 63 11 7 258 278, 63117267045, 7267045, 63 11 7 267 045, 63117304906, 7304906 6, 63 11 7 304 906, 535051806, 535051807 Fitment: Replacement for BMW 5 Series F07 08-13 (Pre-LCI) Fitment: Replacement for BMW 5-Series Saloon F10 (2010-Early 2013) -Pre LCI Fitment: Replacement for BMW 5-Series Estate/Touring F11 (2010-Early 2013)-Pre LCI Fitment: Replacement for BMW 5-Series F07 GT Gran Turismo (2011-2017)-Pre LCI Specification Suitable position: Left or right Material: Plastic Light source type: Halogen Note: Compatibility Check: Ensure that this TMS drive module is suitable for your vehicle model to avoid unnecessary compatibility issues Regular Inspection: Regularly check the headlight function to ensure stable operation of the module and timely detection of potential problems Avoid Overloading: Avoid excessive use of the electrical system during use to prevent damage to the module
